title: gynochthodes scabrifolia
intro: Gynochthodes scabrifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the stinging spurge. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Gynochthodes scabrifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and treat wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
